summary: A brief, lighthearted post from 2004 where Shapiro shares a link from his former Microsoft coworker Raymond Chen about an oversized Victorinox Swiss Army tool. The post is essentially a link-share with a humorous personal anecdote about Raymond's eccentric work attire.
key_points: Links to Raymond Chen's blog post about a comically large Victorinox multi-tool
Includes a quirky personal anecdote about a Microsoft coworker who wore a suit but no shoes
money_quotes: Raymond is the only person I knew at Microsoft who wore a suit to work every day. No shoes, though.
key_insight: A throwaway link post notable only as an early-blog-era snapshot of Shapiro's Microsoft days and his eye for quirky personality details.
